description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a thick, matte black bezel. The front surface is dominated by the screen, which is surrounded by a uniform, slightly recessed border. The rear of the monitor features a gently curved back panel, adding depth and structural support, and is attached to a broad, rectangular pedestal stand that provides stability. The stand appears to be made of the same black plastic as the monitor housing, with a solid, flat base. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a thick black bezel, curved rear panel, and a broad rectangular pedestal stand. The design is minimalistic with no visible buttons, ports, or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, black display area framed by a thick bezel and the flat, rectangular base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the slim profile of the screen and the depth of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved back panel and the full structure of the pedestal stand.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the monitor's thickness and the connection between the stand and the back panel.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, matte black, and uniform in width, with slightly rounded corners and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a broad, flat base and a vertical support, all in matte black plastic with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
